tulu's main strength comes from really long battles because a lot of the value that he can give to a team comes from his rouse giving a lot of strength over time, his 4 cost can also deal a lot of damage because it effectively has ~700%+n*100% (n: number of standing tentacles) tentacle damage scaling but the drawback to using him is that it takes a long time for him to make a difference in fights and all of his cards are expensive, he also requires a lot of survivability from the other team members in order to live while gaining strength and tentacle damage. if you can provide him with the right support and use him for the right stages then he can be really powerful but otherwise it's often better to use a direct damage dealer because they can kill the enemy without needing to spend a long time stacking strength and tentacle damage
